case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CAFIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $696.88 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CAFIFORNIA MORRISON, LEANDRO

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CAFIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $696.88 U.S. CURRENCY; $525.26 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 THROUGH 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO STRIKE CLAIM OF JERRY PIAZZA

NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF JERRY PIAZZA, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CAFIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR JAN-14-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
POS OF ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO STRIKE CLAIM OF JERRY PIAZZA FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CAFIFORNIA

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF JERRY PIAZZA. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PHA) JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR 5797
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-14-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $125.00 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT LEANDRO MORRISON. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $400.26 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
